output.edit_description: Update scripts/validate.sh to run py_compile on all .py files in scripts/.
patch_commands: sed -i 's/.*runs python3 -m py_compile.*$/runs python3 -m py_compile on all .py files in scripts./' scripts/validate.sh
sed -i 's/.*runs python3 -m py_compile.*$/runs python3 -m py_compile on all .py files in scripts./' scripts/validate.sh
